title: Maine Judicial Branch Standing Orders
description: No dedicated standing-orders page exists; standing orders are rows within the same Administrative Orders table. Uses the same source/selectors as jb-admin-orders but filtered to titles containing 'Standing Order', so this feed carries only standing orders.
